title: Origin Zero
description: An upgraded version of the Orble Mod, this adds not only Orble. but two more new ores! (havent tested if those spawn yet lol). In the future, i plan to make more for this mod. The original is and will still be up
body:
Ever wanted a new journey? One where you can find new ores, and find new mobs? Well then, i have the mod for you! Enter the new world of Origin Zero! An exciting world full of new ores, places, mobs, tools, etc. Discover the origin of the first Ore ever created in this fun and tool based mod!

Glel: an Iron alternative that is green, and meant for creating many things.

BloZ: A very early game item centered around helping you get started. Try to find villagers with these, and they can give some nice rewards.

Orble: an item with little is known about it. But it seems... uncharged. Maybe, if you use it right, an old power can be found once more.

DISCLAIMER: this mod is NOT finished. As of writing this, many features are still in development. Please be patient though, as they will come in the near future. For now, use this with other mods.
